microsoft_ft: Owned the **product roadmap** for Azure's resilience validation platform, standardizing identity-grade workflows across 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** for enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining self-service scheduling requirements and cross-platform activation workflows that reduced operational toil by 30% and scaled execution capacity.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level validation capability, shipping in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**—surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous compliance-aware testing.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring strict data-privacy constraints.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21%—demonstrating ability to translate complex technical requirements into scalable product capabilities.

Influenced prioritization across engineering, legal, and commercial stakeholders without direct authority, aligning 6+ teams on a unified roadmap that balanced **accuracy, scalability, and compliance** across distributed platform layers.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation workflows, conducting user demos across 14 Azure service teams and saving 37 engineering hours monthly by translating complex capabilities into clear, actionable value propositions.

Shaped the **identity and intent layer** of an internal platform by leading 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps that influenced roadmap inclusion of intent-based YAML generation.

Improved **data integrity and retrieval** by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search system, reducing lookup time by 83% across a high-volume engineering knowledge base.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and reduced region launch time by 28% by securing cross-functional alignment on an automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams with competing data-platform dependencies.

Defined a product strategy to eliminate manual toil in region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of per-region effort** and building a roadmap to automate critical activation paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and govern platform health with real-time data.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping cross-platform dependencies across 1,200+ stations to ensure accuracy and compliance throughout rollout.

Prioritized a high-velocity backlog to resolve **40+ critical tickets**, facilitating Agile sprint planning and retrospectives that stabilized the developer intake process and unblocked key engineering milestones on schedule.

Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs across a complex, data-intensive environment.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by designing and implementing an end-to-end CRM workflow managing 200+ monthly proposals, standardizing the scoping and invoicing lifecycle to improve data fidelity and conversion rates.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and audience targeting to improve client onboarding match quality.

Strengthened leadership pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering profitability insights that informed strategic decisions across the company's highest-revenue service lines.
